rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees involving ports, implementation scopes for bindings.
Use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope; avoid placing guarantees in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE type declarations match AADL scalar types (int, real, bool) to prevent resolution errors.
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and => for implications.
Do not use opaque Boolean data in numeric comparisons; prefer exact Boolean expressions when port type is bool.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for output dependency contracts.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts unless represented via valid variables.
